basics.name: Dr. Ákos Makra
basics.label: Test Automation Engineer · PhD in Information Science
basics.summary: Test Automation Engineer with a PhD in Information Science, specializing in system and E2E test automation (Python, Behave BDD, Selenium, Playwright). Background in biomedical signal processing and ultrasound imaging research, with international research experience in Germany, Italy, and the Netherlands.

work.name: Magyar Telekom Nyrt.
work.summary: Designing and maintaining automated system and E2E tests, combining business requirements, acceptance criteria, and testing-pyramid principles.
responsibilities: Designed, developed, and maintained system and E2E tests, combining business requirements, acceptance criteria, and testing-pyramid principles (Python, Behave BDD, Cucumber/Gherkin, Selenium, Playwright).
Identified, documented, and tracked defects using log-based root-cause analysis (Kibana/OpenSearch, internal tools).
Mentored QA teams transitioning from manual to automated testing, as well as junior and newly onboarded colleagues.
achievements: Played a key role in raising automated regression and E2E test suite success rates from under 65% to a consistent 95%+ across multiple major projects, while reducing the number of manually executed regression test cases by 30%.

work.name: Effective Group Talent Solutions Kft. — B. Braun project
work.summary: Developed automated integration and unit tests for acute dialysis machines.
responsibilities: Developed automated integration and unit tests for acute dialysis machines (C/C++).

work.name: MedRes Kft.
work.summary: Performed ultrasound simulations, device development and testing.
responsibilities: Performed ultrasound simulations, device development and testing (MATLAB, k-Wave).

work.name: Fraunhofer IBMT
work.summary: Examined biological tissues using scanning acoustic microscopy.
responsibilities: Examined biological tissues using scanning acoustic microscopy (MATLAB).

work.name: University of Florence (MSDLAB)
work.summary: Developed real-time imaging and feature extraction for an ultrasound device.
responsibilities: Developed real-time imaging and feature extraction for an ultrasound device (C++).

work.name: Philips
work.summary: Performed surgical biomedical signal analysis and processing.
responsibilities: Performed surgical biomedical signal analysis and processing (MATLAB).

education.institution: Roska Tamás Doctoral School of Sciences and Technology
education.area: Information Science (PhD) — "Ultrasound Image Modelling and Resolution Enhancement"

projects.name: PhD Research: Ultrasound Image Modelling and Resolution Enhancement
projects.description: PhD thesis research on modelling and improving the resolution of ultrasound images, carried out at the Roska Tamás Doctoral School of Sciences and Technology.
highlights: Combined signal processing and simulation methods to enhance ultrasound image resolution
Included international research placements in Germany, Italy, and the Netherlands

projects.name: Pacific Crest Trail — Southbound Thru-Hike
projects.description: First Hungarian to thru-hike the 4,273 km Pacific Crest Trail southbound (2023).
highlights: 4,273 km continuous hike from Canada to Mexico
Completed in 130 days, hiking the rarer and logistically harder southbound direction

projects.name: Pyrenean Haute Route Thru-Hike
projects.description: Completed the 800 km Pyrenean Haute Route thru-hike (2021).
highlights: 800 km high-altitude route across the Pyrenees
